entries.reason: The 18 changed files form one lifecycle contract across the Independent Review owner, runtime adapters, Guarded Run composition, SSOT, and direct tests. Existing split-plan, Graphify blast radius, responsibility authority, and two independent final reviews establish a coherent owner and review surface; splitting would create incomplete production composition or provenance contracts.
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.

entries.reason: This Story changes only persisted review checkpoints and action-journal composition, introduces no schema migration or query/cache semantics, and current-HEAD focused E2E covers deterministic operation keys, restart replay, terminal-state short circuit, and duplicate-external-work prevention. Rollback is code rollback because persisted checkpoint shapes remain backward compatible.
